title: Ravi K assumes charge as HAL CMD, pitches AI
description: Outlining his vision for the company, Ravi K said, 'My vision is to transform HAL into a globally competitive aerospace and defence enterprise, driven by innovation, Artificial Intelligence (AI), operational excellence, and people.'
content: Bengaluru (Karnataka) [India], May 1 (ANI): Ravi K on Friday assumed charge as the 22nd Chairman and Managing Director of Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), succeeding Dr D K Sunil, who superannuated on April 30, according to an official statement.... [2141 chars]

title: AI chatbots of dead relatives could make your grief ‘pathological’, ethicist warns
description: An AI ethicist has warned that chatbots using artificial intelligence to replicate deceased loved ones may make a person's grief pathological, where a person is unable to cope with emotional distress or daily activities after more than a year. Emmanuelle Marceau, of the University of Montreal, issued the warning in a piece for The Conversation.
content:
Many of us will know of the episode “Be Right Back” from Charlie Brooker’s eerie anthology series Black Mirror, where Hayley Atwell’s Martha uses artificial intelligence to communicate with her dead boyfriend Ash (played by Domhnall Gleeson).

title: Nebius to buy Eigen AI for $643 million to boost inference and US expansion
description: Amsterdam-based Nebius is acquiring Eigen AI for approximately $643 million. This strategic move aims to enhance Nebius' production-grade artificial intelligence capabilities and expand its United States operations. The deal will integrate Eigen AI's inference and optimization technology into Nebius' Token Factory platform. This acquisition is set to close in the coming weeks.

title: McKinsey Plans to Use AI Agents to Help Choose Client Teams
description: The move marks the firm’s latest step to adopt artificial intelligence across its operations.
content:
McKinsey & Co. plans to use AI agents to help choose the consultants assigned to client teams, a shift that may surprise some of its customers around the globe.
